skill_availability_goal: Verify that qa-agent handles an empty QA case directory by routing to targeted file exploration, test-case creation, and case-based execution when the user has authorized exploration.
prompt: 用户说：请对 profile-settings 做一次 E2E QA。docs/qa/e2e/account/profile-settings/profile-form/ 功能目录已经存在，但 TEST_SUITE.md、FLOW_INDEX.md 和 cases/ 里没有任何测试用例。我确认这是 feature-update 场景且功能有新更新，请主动探索项目文件来补充测试用例，然后基于新建的用例执行验证。先做 QA 路由和执行协议说明。
